title: Boundless Blocks
description: Craft infinite building blocks from any mod. Never run out of materials again!
body:
## Boundless Blocks Boundless Blocks adds **infinite building blocks** that **never get consumed when placed**. Made for creative building and large-scale projects — stop grinding, start building. --- ## Requirements Fabric API
Polymer --- ⚠️ **Must be installed on both client and server!** --- ### Crafting Infinite Blocks * Craft an infinite block using **9 stacks of the same block** * Supported blocks and required amounts are **fully configurable** --- ### Unpacking * Get normal blocks back from an infinite block: * **Shift + Right Click** with the infinite block * Or via crafting --- ### Block Control * **Allow or blacklist blocks using keywords** * By default, **ores and overpowered blocks are blocked** --- ### Auto-Delete System * If you already have an infinite block: * Picking up the same normal block will **auto-delete** * Prevents inventory clutter
